key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise hitting growth/semis duration
Iran deal unravels, oil spikes, risk-off rotation
Semiconductor momentum unwinds after parabolic run
June CPI reaccelerates on energy base effects

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex cycle, Iran de-escalation lowers tail risk for risk assets.
Momentum factor leadership continues with risk-on tape post-oil drop.
Semis-heavy export market with strong trend; benefits from chip cycle.
Dovish FOMC potential and falling oil support large-cap growth into July.
Hedge versus sticky CPI surprise and geopolitical reversal risk.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/semis and momentum given risk-on backdrop from Iran de-escalation, oil drop easing inflation pressure, and supportive FOMC setup, with gold hedge against sticky headline CPI.
rationale_summary: Pro-risk growth/semis tilt with momentum and Korea leverage to chip cycle; gold hedges inflation/geopolitical reversal.
